title: Juhl combinatorics module aggregate
summary: Collects the formal jet recursion, low-order syntax checks, formal statement, abstract OR bridge, and curved-OR assembly under one import path.

mathematicalContent.heading: Module role
mathematicalContent.body: This file introduces no declarations; it only imports the Juhl combinatorics stack.

mathematicalContent.heading: Included pipeline
mathematicalContent.body: The imported files build formal jet syntax, recursively produce formal obstruction expressions, check orders one and two, and connect formal right-hand sides through abstract bridge data.

references.locator: Formal Juhl-type formula and OR bridge
references.note: Primary source for the intended curved OR–Juhl identity.
Source for the Juhl side of the formal syntax.

limitations: Importing this aggregate does not establish the geometric Juhl formula. The imported stack remains a formal syntax and bridge scaffold, with actual OR/GJMS comparison and general coefficients still absent.
